01 / Introduction & Summary

About Me

I'm Yerramsetti Sai Satya Puneeth — a Computer Science undergraduate specializing in AI & ML at Lovely Professional University. I love the craft of building: clean architectures, well-documented code, and systems that perform in the real world.

From orchestrating three LLM agents with LangChain to shipping a real-time cross-platform chat app and a Flutter-based grocery delivery app — I move with intention and ship things that actually work.

Beyond the screen, I've coordinated a 36-hour hackathon for 200+ participants, attended AWS community events, and volunteered in social welfare. Tech is most meaningful when it serves people.

"I don't just build features — I build systems that work."

03 / Projects

What I've Built

View Screenshots
01
GrabIt — Last Minute Grocery App
Flutter Student Project

A full-featured grocery delivery app built with Flutter. Features OTP auth, product categories (Vegetables & Dairy, Snacks), cart management, live order tracking with delivery agent info, and a clean home screen with category browsing.

FlutterDartFirebaseOTP Auth
GitHub →
View Screenshots
02
Realtime Chat Application
Jan – Feb 2026

Cross-platform real-time chat app built with Flutter and Supabase. Features email/password auth, user search, conversation list, and instant message delivery via DB event listeners — zero polling.

FlutterSupabasePostgreSQLDartProvider
GitHub →
Agentic AI
03
Agentic AI
2025 – 2026

An autonomous AI agent system capable of planning, reasoning, and executing multi-step tasks. Leverages LLMs with tool use, memory, and iterative self-improvement loops to handle complex real-world workflows.
